rationale: This is a classic Bus Jam / puzzle "relaxation" hook — its calm, top-down stylus puzzle aesthetic clashes hard with Crazy Kick's energetic, competitive 3D stickman soccer DNA, and the sandy-yellow/sky-blue palette doesn't align with the orange/blue puzzle look. Mechanically there's no transferable signal: swipe-to-aim physics shots and dodging defenders cannot be honestly conveyed by a parking-lot sliding puzzle, so usage would risk misleading-ad policy flags and poor D1 retention. Only minor audience overlap on the broad casual male skew — recommend skipping this archetype unless we test a deliberate fake-puzzle-to-soccer bait-and-switch, which carries store-policy risk.
